cast.name: 约瑟芬·柯尼格 Josefine Koenig

writer.name: 尤斯汀娜·尤尔根森 Justina Jürgensen

director.name: 尤斯汀娜·尤尔根森 Justina Jürgensen

this_title: What the Fuck Is Going on Between Us, Fuck?
introduction: The young soccer player Lola is desperate. If only she weren't so hopelessly in love with her teammate Zoe. But Zoe hardly notices her - or does she? During their joint training, Lola makes no secret of her alleged dislike and tries to hide her feelings from the rest of the team. She is so occupied that she sabotages her actual goal, and risks losing her chance with Zoe forever. Or perhaps there is still a way?
chinese_title: What the Fuck Is Going on Between Us, Fuck?
